strengths: Extensive TypeScript and full-stack experience across 10+ years of professional delivery in scalable, distributed systems
Proven expertise in software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, clean architecture) and modern DevOps tooling (AWS, Docker, Kubernetes)
Demonstrates adaptability and learning agility by successfully working across diverse tech stacks and mentoring others through workshops
concerns: Dramatically overqualified: Staff Engineer level seeking junior/mid-level role creates misalignment in career trajectory and compensation expectations
Database background is MongoDB-heavy with limited explicit PostgreSQL experience; no mention of Nest.js despite it being a core requirement
Geographic fit uncertain: currently based in Berlin working at re:cinq, unclear if available for high on-site presence at a different location
response.justification: Bogdan is a highly accomplished engineer with exceptional technical depth, but represents a fundamental seniority mismatch—a Staff Engineer would find this junior/mid-level role intellectually understimulating and likely underpaid. While TypeScript, React, and modern infrastructure expertise align well, the MongoDB background diverges from PostgreSQL requirements, and geographic availability for on-site presence is unclear. This profile suggests an overqualification risk with retention concerns.
